system.description:
The psyker extends his mind to identify other sentient minds within range without line of sight. DoS 1 = crude impression of number of minds and rough position; DoS 2 = number, general location, relative strength, can identify psykers with a Psyniscience Test; DoS 3 = may attempt telepathic communication with any sensed mind; DoS 4+ = may attempt a Mind Probe on one sensed mind. Untouchables, mindless creatures, and psychically inert beings are invisible to this technique.

Focus Power Test: Willpower

Prerequisites: Mind's Eye, Mind Probe

XP Cost: 300
